phase: Phase 2.7 mapper v0.1F / v0.1G prep — 2024 hold resolution
status: documentation only; no mapper code changes
purpose: Resolve the four 2024-specific items that were on hold or under-documented in prior audits: CC24_323f wording, CC24_324 abortion battery directionality, CC24_340a/b/c code maps + CC24_340b hold confirmation, CC24_328 MAT code maps.
explicitly_not_in_this_audit: No engine / selector / topK / browser / dist / output / live-data / candidate / era-context edits.
No edits to generated smoke outputs.

headline_finding.name: CC24_323f is NOT a 2024 immigration item
headline_finding.exact_wording: Forgive up to $20,000 of student loan debt for each person
headline_finding.evidence: Docx layout: row appears between CC24_328e and the next page break inside the CC24_328grid block; CSV header position is between CC24_328e and CC24_330a, NOT adjacent to CC24_323a..d.
headline_finding.explanation: YouGov / Qualtrics survey-design carryover: the variable was placeholder-named CC24_323f during script authoring and never renamed when reassigned to the tax-policies grid.
correction_to_prior_audits: mapper-v01-source-directionality-audit.json (Pass 2): held CC24_323f pending docx — RESOLVED here.
mapper-cd-breadth-source-audit.json: not affected (CD-breadth audit didn't include CC24_323f).

battery_prompts_2024.CC24_323grid: What do you think the U.S. government should do about immigration? Do you support or oppose each of the following?
battery_prompts_2024.CC24_324grid: On the topic of abortion, do you support or oppose each of the following proposals?
battery_prompts_2024.CC24_328grid: (Tax policies battery — implicit prompt; same Support/Oppose response set)
battery_prompts_2024.CC24_340grid: Do you support or oppose each of the following bills before Congress?

items.exact_wording: Forgive up to $20,000 of student loan debt for each person
items.direction: Support → MAT low (pro-redistribution); Oppose → MAT high
cross_loads: generational fairness frame; some MAT-low respondents oppose for fairness/precedent reasons
items.implementation_note: Mapper v0.1F/0.1G must read column 'CC24_323f' (with literal 323f suffix) and route to MAT composite alongside CC24_328a..e. Variable-name pattern is the sole gotcha; value semantics identical to rest of CC24_328 battery.
items.prior_status_corrected: Pass 2 audit held the column pending docx — now resolved as MAT, not CU.

items.exact_wording: Always allow a woman the right to obtain an abortion as a matter of choice
Permit abortion only in case of rape, incest or when the woman's life is in danger
items.direction_intended: Support → CD high (with same Pass-1 ambiguity as CC16/CC20_332b — Oppose can mean 'too restrictive' OR 'not restrictive enough')
items.v02_mitigation: Code Oppose conditional on CC24_324c (total ban) response — same mechanic as 2016/2020 332b.

items.exact_wording: Make abortions illegal in all circumstances
Expand access to abortion, including making it more affordable, broadening the types of providers who can offer care, and protecting access to abortion clinics
Prohibit government restrictions on the provision of, and access to, contraceptives.
Prohibit government restrictions on the provision of, and access to, abortion services.
items.hold_reason: Wording explicitly mirrors CC24_324a + CC24_324d; including in CD composite alongside abortion battery would over-weight abortion axis vs contraceptives (CC24_340a) and same-sex marriage (CC24_340c).
items.alternative_use: Sanity check: weighted For-share for CC24_340b vs average For-share across CC24_324a + CC24_324d. Divergence > ~3pp flags potential routing/skip issue or respondent confusion. Surfaces to data-quality stats block, not composite.

items.exact_wording: Require that all federal agencies recognize same-sex marriages and interracial marriages.
Relax local zoning laws in your state to allow for construction of more apartments and condos.
items.direction: ambiguous — YIMBY progressives + free-market conservatives both Support

items.exact_wording: Expand federal tax incentives to encourage developers to build homes for people who make less than half of the average income in your area
Require able-bodied adults under 64 years of age who do not have dependents to have a job in order to receive Medicaid.
Expand Medicaid to cover individuals making less than $25,000 and families making less than $40,000 a year.

items_missing_vs_2016_2020: Hyde Amendment / federal funding (CC16/CC20_332e — present 2016/2020, absent 2024)
cc24_324_abortion_battery_thinness.implication: 2024 abortion-battery CD signal has 3 ship-ready items (a, c, d) vs 4 from 2016/2020 (a, c, e, f). CD-breadth items CC24_340a + CC24_340c partially compensate, but the 2024 abortion-axis CD signal alone is structurally weaker.

CU_position.note: CC24_323f explicitly NOT in CU composite.

MAT_position.note: Resolution of CC24_323f means 2024 MAT now has 5 contributing items, structurally at par with 2016 and stronger than 2020.

implementation_notes_for_v01F_v01G: Column 'CC24_323f' belongs to MAT composite, NOT CU. Critical resolver-table entry.
CC24_340b is read but not routed into CD composite — used only for data-quality consistency check vs CC24_324a + CC24_324d.
All other CC24_3* items in scope share universal Support/Oppose code map (1=Support, 2=Oppose, 8=Skipped, 9=Not Asked, .=Missing).

remaining_holds_after_pass3.reason: direction ambiguity — YIMBY progressives + free-market conservatives both Support
remaining_holds_after_pass3.v02_mitigation: potentially split into MAT vs CD load via interaction with respondent's MAT and CD answers; needs joint-modeling
use as confirmation-only signal indefinitely; do not include in primary composite

terminology: moralBoundaries.national is the canonical compound moral-circle boundary per ADR-006. Engagement is referenced only as a downstream concern — separate 1D continuous scalar per ADR canon — not surfaced by any item audited here. Legacy code identifiers (CC24_*) appear only as CCES variable names.

revision_history.description: Pass 3: docx-extracted CC24_323f wording (resolved as student-loan MAT item, NOT immigration); confirmed CC24_324a..d directions; confirmed CC24_340a/b/c codes; confirmed CC24_328a..e codes.
